arabic: يَا أَيُّهَا الَّذِينَ آمَنُوا كُتِبَ عَلَيْكُمُ الصِّيَامُ كَمَا كُتِبَ عَلَى الَّذِينَ مِن قَبْلِكُمْ لَعَلَّكُمْ تَتَّقُونَ
translation: O you who believe! Fasting is prescribed for you as it was prescribed for those before you, that you may attain Taqwa.

arabic: شَهْرُ رَمَضَانَ الَّذِي أُنزِلَ فِيهِ الْقُرْآنُ هُدًى لِّلنَّاسِ وَبَيِّنَاتٍ مِّنَ الْهُدَىٰ وَالْفُرْقَانِ
translation: The month of Ramadan in which the Quran was revealed, a guidance for the people and clear proofs of guidance and criterion.

arabic: وَإِذَا سَأَلَكَ عِبَادِي عَنِّي فَإِنِّي قَرِيبٌ ۖ أُجِيبُ دَعْوَةَ الدَّاعِ إِذَا دَعَانِ
translation: And when My servants ask you concerning Me — indeed I am near. I respond to the invocation of the supplicant when he calls upon Me.

arabic: وَاسْتَعِينُوا بِالصَّبْرِ وَالصَّلَاةِ ۚ وَإِنَّهَا لَكَبِيرَةٌ إِلَّا عَلَى الْخَاشِعِينَ
translation: And seek help through patience and prayer, and indeed it is difficult except for the humbly submissive.

arabic: فَاذْكُرُونِي أَذْكُرْكُمْ وَاشْكُرُوا لِي وَلَا تَكْفُرُونِ
translation: So remember Me; I will remember you. And be grateful to Me and do not deny Me.

arabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ مَعَ الصَّابِرِينَ
translation: Indeed, Allah is with the patient.

arabic: وَلَنَبْلُوَنَّكُم بِشَيْءٍ مِّنَ الْخَوْفِ وَالْجُوعِ وَنَقْصٍ مِّنَ الْأَمْوَالِ وَالْأَنفُسِ وَالثَّمَرَاتِ ۗ وَبَشِّرِ الصَّابِرِينَ
translation: And We will surely test you with something of fear and hunger and a loss of wealth and lives and fruits, but give good tidings to the patient.

arabic: رَبَّنَا آتِنَا فِي الدُّنْيَا حَسَنَةً وَفِي الْآخِرَةِ حَسَنَةً وَقِنَا عَذَابَ النَّارِ
translation: Our Lord, give us good in this world and good in the Hereafter, and save us from the punishment of the Fire.

arabic: لَا يُكَلِّفُ اللَّهُ نَفْسًا إِلَّا وُسْعَهَا
translation: Allah does not burden a soul beyond that it can bear.

arabic: رَبَّنَا لَا تُؤَاخِذْنَا إِن نَّسِينَا أَوْ أَخْطَأْنَا
translation: Our Lord, do not impose blame upon us if we forget or make a mistake.

arabic: قُلْ إِن كُنتُمْ تُحِبُّونَ اللَّهَ فَاتَّبِعُونِي يُحْبِبْكُمُ اللَّهُ وَيَغْفِرْ لَكُمْ ذُنُوبَكُمْ
translation: Say: If you love Allah, then follow me, Allah will love you and forgive you your sins.

arabic: وَسَارِعُوا إِلَىٰ مَغْفِرَةٍ مِّن رَّبِّكُمْ وَجَنَّةٍ عَرْضُهَا السَّمَاوَاتُ وَالْأَرْضُ أُعِدَّتْ لِلْمُتَّقِينَ
translation: And hasten to forgiveness from your Lord and a garden as wide as the heavens and earth, prepared for the righteous.

arabic: وَالْكَاظِمِينَ الْغَيْظَ وَالْعَافِينَ عَنِ النَّاسِ ۗ وَاللَّهُ يُحِبُّ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
translation: Who restrain anger and who pardon the people — and Allah loves the doers of good.

arabic: إِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
translation: Indeed, with hardship comes ease.

arabic: وَمَن يَتَّقِ اللَّهَ يَجْعَل لَّهُ مَخْرَجًا وَيَرْزُقْهُ مِنْ حَيْثُ لَا يَحْتَسِبُ
translation: And whoever fears Allah — He will make for him a way out and will provide for him from where he does not expect.

arabic: وَمَن يَتَوَكَّلْ عَلَى اللَّهِ فَهُوَ حَسْبُهُ
translation: And whoever relies upon Allah — then He is sufficient for him.

arabic: إِنَّ اللَّهَ لَا يُغَيِّرُ مَا بِقَوْمٍ حَتَّىٰ يُغَيِّرُوا مَا بِأَنفُسِهِمْ
translation: Indeed, Allah will not change the condition of a people until they change what is in themselves.

arabic: أَلَا بِذِكْرِ اللَّهِ تَطْمَئِنُّ الْقُلُوبُ
translation: Verily, in the remembrance of Allah do hearts find rest.

arabic: وَقُل رَّبِّ زِدْنِي عِلْمًا
translation: And say: My Lord, increase me in knowledge.

arabic: ادْعُونِي أَسْتَجِبْ لَكُمْ
translation: Call upon Me; I will respond to you.

arabic: إِنَّا أَنزَلْنَاهُ فِي لَيْلَةِ الْقَدْرِ
translation: Indeed, We sent the Quran down during the Night of Decree.

arabic: لَيْلَةُ الْقَدْرِ خَيْرٌ مِّنْ أَلْفِ شَهْرٍ
translation: The Night of Decree is better than a thousand months.

arabic: تَنَزَّلُ الْمَلَائِكَةُ وَالرُّوحُ فِيهَا بِإِذْنِ رَبِّهِم مِّن كُلِّ أَمْرٍ
translation: The angels and the Spirit descend therein by permission of their Lord for every matter.

arabic: سَلَامٌ هِيَ حَتَّىٰ مَطْلَعِ الْفَجْرِ
translation: Peace it is until the emergence of dawn.

arabic: وَاللَّهُ يُحِبُّ الْمُحْسِنِينَ
translation: And Allah loves the doers of good.

arabic: فَإِنَّ مَعَ الْعُسْرِ يُسْرًا
translation: For indeed, with hardship will be ease.

arabic: وَنَحْنُ أَقْرَبُ إِلَيْهِ مِنْ حَبْلِ الْوَرِيدِ
translation: And We are closer to him than his jugular vein.

arabic: وَإِلَىٰ رَبِّكَ فَارْغَب
translation: And to your Lord direct your longing.

arabic: وَرَحْمَتِي وَسِعَتْ كُلَّ شَيْءٍ
translation: And My mercy encompasses all things.

arabic: الْحَمْدُ لِلَّهِ رَبِّ الْعَالَمِينَ
translation: All praise is due to Allah, Lord of all the worlds.
